data.title: 国际服卡池复刻「Take joy in deep sea fishing. I'll share my catch with you, Sensei.」&「I'm glad I came here. I hope we can stay just like this for a little while...」

data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 12/30 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Kanna (Swimsuit), 3★ Fubuki (Swimsuit), 3★ Shiroko (Swimsuit), 3★ Nonomi (Swimsuit)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 12/30 (Tue) After Maintenance – 1/6 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
